mapper.select: select ${column} as name, count(*) as item_value from youth_info where deleted = 0 and youth_type = #{youthType} and ${column} is not null and ${column} != '' group by ${column} order by item_value desc

select case when year(current_date) - year(birth_date) <= 20 then '20岁及以下' when year(current_date) - year(birth_date) between 21 and 25 then '21-25岁' when year(current_date) - year(birth_date) between 26 and 30 then '26-30岁' else '30岁以上' end as name, count(*) as item_value from youth_info where deleted = 0 and youth_type = #{youthType} and birth_date is not null group by case when year(current_date) - year(birth_date) <= 20 then '20岁及以下' when year(current_date) - year(birth_date) between 21 and 25 then '21-25岁' when year(current_date) - year(birth_date) between 26 and 30 then '26-30岁' else '30岁以上' end

select coalesce(d.dict_label, yi.education_level) as name, count(*) as item_value from youth_info yi left join sys_dict_item d on d.dict_type = 'education_level' and d.dict_value = yi.education_level and d.enabled = 1 and d.deleted = 0 where yi.deleted = 0 and yi.youth_type = #{youthType} and yi.education_level is not null and yi.education_level != '' group by yi.education_level, d.dict_label order by item_value desc

select coalesce(d.dict_label, yi.gender) as name, count(*) as item_value from youth_info yi left join sys_dict_item d on d.dict_type = 'gender' and d.dict_value = yi.gender and d.enabled = 1 and d.deleted = 0 where yi.deleted = 0 and yi.youth_type = #{youthType} and yi.gender is not null and yi.gender != '' group by yi.gender, d.dict_label order by yi.gender

select coalesce(d.dict_label, yi.ethnicity) as name, count(*) as item_value from youth_info yi left join sys_dict_item d on d.dict_type = 'ethnicity' and d.dict_value = yi.ethnicity and d.enabled = 1 and d.deleted = 0 where yi.deleted = 0 and yi.youth_type = #{youthType} and yi.ethnicity is not null and yi.ethnicity != '' group by yi.ethnicity, d.dict_label order by item_value desc

select d.dict_label as name, count(yi.id) as item_value from sys_dict_item d left join sys_school s on s.category_dict_item_id = d.id and s.deleted = 0 left join youth_info yi on yi.school_code = s.school_code and yi.deleted = 0 and yi.youth_type = #{youthType} where d.deleted = 0 and d.enabled = 1 and d.dict_type = 'school_category' group by d.id, d.dict_label, d.sort_no order by d.sort_no, d.id

select d.dict_label as name, count(yi.id) as item_value from sys_dict_item d left join sys_major_catalog m on m.category_dict_item_id = d.id and m.deleted = 0 left join youth_info yi on yi.major_code = m.major_code and yi.deleted = 0 and yi.youth_type = #{youthType} where d.deleted = 0 and d.enabled = 1 and d.dict_type = 'major_category' group by d.id, d.dict_label, d.sort_no order by d.sort_no, d.id

select t.tag_name, s.school_name, count(yi.id) as item_value from sys_school_tag t join sys_school_tag_rel rel on rel.tag_id = t.id and rel.deleted = 0 join sys_school s on s.id = rel.school_id and s.deleted = 0 join youth_info yi on yi.school_code = s.school_code and yi.deleted = 0 and yi.youth_type = #{youthType} and where t.deleted = 0 group by t.id, t.tag_name, s.id, s.school_name order by t.tag_name, item_value desc, s.school_name
